stack.title: Vision
stack.body: Did not use limelight instead used a webcam and onboard computations

stack.title: Pathing
stack.body: used pedropathing and GoBuilda pinpoint module

stack.title: Intake
stack.body: A boot wheel based intake, same motor powered the feeder mechanism

stack.title: Launcher
stack.body: Used parallel launcher which is two wheels rotating opposite of each other that the ball is pushed through

timeline.title: The Screamage
timeline.detail: we had the robot that would become our final version

timeline.title: South Bay Meet #1
timeline.detail: Wheel belt broke before first match had to borrow a belt from a different team

timeline.title: South Bay Meet #3
timeline.detail: Increased placement up by one spot

timeline.title: South Bay League Tournament
timeline.detail: at the end of quals we were third and at the end of tournament we were still third
